name: Compartmental Modeling
short_description: Biophysical simulation of neurons split into discrete cable compartments.
detailed_description: Compartmental modeling represents a neuron as a set of connected cable compartments with membrane capacitance, axial resistance, and voltage-gated conductances. This project's central methodology uses compartmental simulation (NEURON or an equivalent solver) to link morphology, channel distribution, and synaptic inputs to the cell's spiking output.
